title: The relationship between chronic skin conditions and depression and how successful dermatologic treatment could improve patients’ mental health: An evidence-based systematic review protocol
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"144fa","text":"Psychodermatology is the interaction between the skin and the mind. Currently,
there is no standardized process for providing Dermatology patients with
depression screenings. We will conduct a systematic review to determine the value of providing patients who have chronic
skin conditions with a PHQ-9 screening prior to, during, and after treatment. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5ker0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ehs","text":"*This protocol follows PRISMA-P guidelines and is provided as an attachment.* ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
